SpiralSafe: Secure API Key Management for Blockchain Networks
Safeguard your blockchain applications with SpiralSafe's confidential computing-powered API key management platform.
Learn More
Confidential Computing with AWS Nitro Enclaves
Ironclad Security
SpiralSafe leverages AWS Nitro Enclaves to create a highly secure, isolated computing environment for your API keys.
Confidential Data
With Nitro Enclaves, your sensitive key material never leaves the secure enclave, ensuring maximum protection.
Trusted Execution
The Nitro Hypervisor guarantees that code running inside the enclave is authentic and unmodified.
Seamless Integration with HashiCorp Vault
Unified Key Management
SpiralSafe integrates seamlessly with HashiCorp Vault, allowing you to manage all your cryptographic keys in one place.
Automated Workflows
Leverage Vault's powerful automation features to streamline key provisioning, rotation, and revocation.
Centralized Governance
Maintain robust access control and audit trails across your entire key management infrastructure.
Scalable Key Management for DeFi, Fintech, and Blockchain
1
Onboard with Ease
Rapidly provision API keys for your blockchain-based applications, from DeFi platforms to fintech services.
2
Secure Key Rotation
Automatically rotate API keys on a schedule to maintain the highest levels of security.
3
Granular Access Control
Implement fine-grained permissions to ensure the right users and applications have access to the right keys.
Real-Time Monitoring and Alerts
Usage Insights
Monitor key usage patterns and detect anomalies in real-time.
Proactive Notifications
Receive instant alerts for key-related events, such as unauthorized access attempts.
Comprehensive Reports
Generate detailed audit logs and compliance reports for your key management activities.
Compliance and Audit Capabilities
Regulatory Compliance
SpiralSafe helps you meet industry-specific compliance requirements, such as PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and SOC 2, through robust access controls and comprehensive audit trails.
Third-Party Audits
  • Regular security audits by independent, accredited third-party assessors
  • Comprehensive documentation and evidence to support compliance efforts
  • Seamless integration with your existing audit and reporting processes
Flexible Deployment Options
1
SaaS
Leverage the power of SpiralSafe as a fully-managed, cloud-hosted service.
2
Self-Hosted
Deploy SpiralSafe on-premises or in your own private cloud environment.
3
Hybrid
Combine the benefits of both cloud and on-premises deployment models.
Trusted by Leading Enterprises
1
Blockchain and DeFi
Secure the API keys powering the world's leading blockchain and DeFi platforms.
2
Fintech and Payments
Protect the sensitive cryptographic keys used in critical fintech and payment systems.
3
Enterprise Technology
Empower developers and security teams at top technology companies with SpiralSafe.
